title: Malaysian Maple Pancakes with Resiny Maple Syrup
description: A sweet and festive breakfast recipe featuring malaysian pancakes topped with a resiny maple syrup.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, coconut, eggs, maple syrup, and spices.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Drop 1/4 cupfuls of the batter onto the skillet.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
In a small saucepan, heat the resiny maple syrup over low heat.
Serve the pancakes warm with the resiny maple syrup drizzled on top.
Garnish with butter and skillet oil.
